summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stockholm bus search app with new Leaflet map features, departure notifications, and navigation improvements. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend features mostly functional with minor issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Some stops (like Stop 1022) show 'Inga avgångar hittades' even when they should have departures

integration_issues.issue: Departure rows sometimes not found immediately after navigation, requires longer wait times

passed_tests: Backend API /api/nearby returns nearby stops with distance
Backend API /api/stops/search returns results with global_id
Backend API /api/departures/9192 returns departures with transport_mode
'Nära mig' tab has functional map/list toggle buttons
Map renders with dark CARTO tiles and 1km radius circle
Map shows user location (blue dot) and stop markers (blue pins)
Clicking map stop marker shows popup with stop name, distance, and 'Visa avgångar' button
Clicking 'Visa avgångar' in popup successfully navigates to departures tab
List view in 'Nära mig' shows stops with distance and arrow icons
Clicking stops in list view navigates to departures tab
Search dropdown shows recent searches with clear button
Bell notification toggle buttons present on departure rows (when departures exist)
Transport mode filter buttons functional (when departures exist)
Geolocation integration working with Stockholm coordinates

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Most features working, minor timing and data issues

action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate why some stops (like Stop 1022 from Gustav Adolfs torg) return 'Inga avgångar hittades' when they should have departures. This might be related to stop ID mapping or SL API data availability. Also consider adding loading states for departure fetching to improve UX.
